name: acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes
description: Degenerative (osteoarthritic) changes affecting the acromioclavicular (AC) joint characterized by joint space narrowing, osteophyte formation, subchondral sclerosis, cysts, and related features visualized on shoulder imaging.

attributes.name: presence
attributes.description: Whether degenerative changes are identified at the acromioclavicular joint.

values.name: present
values.description: Degenerative features are seen at the ac joint.

values.name: absent
values.description: No degenerative features identified at the ac joint.

values.name: indeterminate
values.description: Presence of acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes cannot be determined

values.name: unknown
values.description: Presence of acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes is unknown

attributes.name: change from prior
attributes.description: Whether and how a acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes has changed over time

values.name: unchanged
values.description: Acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes is unchanged

values.name: stable
values.description: Acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes is stable

values.name: increased
values.description: Acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes has increased

values.name: decreased
values.description: Acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes has decreased

values.name: new
values.description: Acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes is new

values.name: resolved
values.description: Acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes seen on a prior exam has resolved

values.name: no prior
values.description: No prior exam available for comparison of acromioclavicular joint degenerative changes

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Temporal comparison of the degenerative changes relative to prior imaging when available.

values.name: new
values.description: Findings not present on prior exam or newly apparent.

values.name: unchanged
values.description: No appreciable change compared with prior imaging.

values.name: increased
values.description: Findings have progressed compared with prior imaging.

values.name: resolved
values.description: Findings present previously are no longer seen.

attributes.name: severity
attributes.description: Overall degree of degenerative change at the ac joint.

values.name: mild
values.description: Minimal degenerative change, often early or asymptomatic.

values.name: moderate
values.description: Clear degenerative change with moderate joint alteration.

values.name: severe
values.description: Marked degenerative change with severe joint alteration.

attributes.name: joint space narrowing
attributes.description: Radiographic narrowing of the acromioclavicular joint space.

values.name: present
values.description: Reduced joint space compared with expected normal.

values.name: absent
values.description: No appreciable joint space narrowing.

attributes.name: osteophyte formation
attributes.description: Presence of marginal bony spurs at the acromioclavicular joint.

values.name: present
values.description: Osteophytes visualized at the joint margins.

values.name: absent
values.description: No osteophytes identified.

attributes.name: subchondral sclerosis
attributes.description: Increased subchondral bone density beneath the articular surface.

values.name: present
values.description: Subchondral sclerosis is visible beneath the joint surface.

values.name: absent
values.description: No subchondral sclerosis identified.

attributes.name: subchondral cysts
attributes.description: Rounded subchondral lucencies that may reflect cystic degeneration.

values.name: present
values.description: Subchondral cysts identified adjacent to the joint.

values.name: absent
values.description: No subchondral cysts identified.

attributes.name: capsular thickening
attributes.description: Thickening of the joint capsule surrounding the acromioclavicular joint.

values.name: present
values.description: Capsular thickening or fibrosis is observed.

values.name: absent
values.description: No capsular thickening identified.

attributes.name: distal clavicle osteolysis
attributes.description: Resorptive change or loss of bone at the distal clavicle.

values.name: present
values.description: Osteolytic resorption of the distal clavicle is present.

values.name: absent
values.description: No distal clavicle osteolysis identified.
